pending.message:
fix: design system compliance, accessibility, and spec updates

- Add shadow elevation + hover feedback to WidgetCard (design system rule)
- Fix modal backdrop role="presentation" in ImportModal and ShortcutsModal
- Replace hardcoded #fff in TaskCheckbox with var(--color-on-accent)
- Update master-plan.md with March 21 status audit
- Update gap-analysis.md with resolved gaps (auth, serverless, SonarCloud)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: migrate raw localStorage to storage.js + add 44 new tests

- Migrate 11 files from raw localStorage to getStorageItem/setStorageItem
- Update 5 consulting page callers to prevent double-prefixing
- Update 5 existing test files for versioned storage format
- Add useTaskPipeline tests (18 tests)
- Add useKeyboardShortcuts tests (8 tests)
- Add useContactEnrichmentBatch tests (8 tests)
- Add useContactDeals tests (10 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

eras.title: Enterprise Foundation
eras.subtitle: Production-Grade Depth and Security
eras.description: Established enterprise-level foundation with comprehensive accessibility, error handling, security hardening, and production infrastructure. Added multi-tenant architecture, AI agents, and mobile optimization across all features.

changes.text: Added enterprise depth to all views with skeletons, error handling, accessibility, and validation
Implemented multi-tenant schema with organizations, team memberships, and RLS policies
Added n8n workflow definitions for scheduled data synchronization
Built contact enrichment pipeline with Clay MCP integration and AI research
Added deal scoring, follow-up automation, and pipeline forecasting features
Implemented document upload to Supabase Storage with drag-drop interface
Created learning dashboard with golden examples and pattern visualization
Added Overnight Agent workflow for autonomous Claude code execution
Optimized mobile experience with responsive breakpoints and touch targets
Hardened security with prompt injection protection and input validation
Added comprehensive test suite with 337 new API and executor tests
Integrated CodeQL, Semgrep, and SonarCloud for automated quality assurance
Refactored large components into smaller, maintainable modules
